text: The Aramaic text has nothing corresponding to this chapter. Some think that verses 11-23 are a separate psalm, which has been attached accidentally to the canticle of Tobias. If we understand these sentiments as having been expressed by Tobias, it must have been by way of prophecy; the dates given in the next chapter shew that he cannot have been alive at the time when Jerusalem was sacked by the king of Babylon.
